tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":"(def merged-prs (filter (fn [pr] (and (= (:state pr) \"merged\") (some? (:closes_linear pr)))) (github_pull_requests)))(def matching-prs (filter (fn [pr] (let [linear-id (:closes_linear pr)] (and (some? linear-id) (let [linear-issue (first (linear_issues {:id linear-id}))] (and linear-issue (not= (:state linear-issue) \"done\"))))) merged-prs))(count matching-prs)"}
